name: 4ge
description: The production layer for Claude Code. 37 commands and 40 skills across 9 OS capabilities: multi-agent forge orchestration, 6-pass adversarial code review, AISLE security posture, persistent memory, systematic debugging, live HUD, and more.

forge.description: Multi-teammate orchestrator. Use /forge <task>, /forge resume, or /forge park.

dfe.description: AI code review — 6-pass DFE analysis (5 Sonnet + 1 Opus adversarial).

audit.description: Run code quality audit — 70 checks across 10 domains.

aisle.description: [AISLE] AI Security Learning Environment — security posture, scanning, and threat management.

blueprint.description: Bootstrap or update a Claude Code environment.

help.description: 4ge plugin glossary, command index, and usage guide.
help.argumentHint: [command-name | hooks | skills] or empty for full index

recall.description: Guided Knowledge hub: memory search, repo map, context budget, respawn, decisions. Use /recall for the menu or /recall <query> for dev-memory search.

secret.description: Capture a secret to .env without crossing model context.

superdupersecret.description: Alias of /secret for secret capture without model-context exposure.

commit.description: Redirects to /ship. Use /ship --no-push to commit without pushing.

ship.description: Verify, commit, and push — full delivery pipeline.

pr.description: Verify, commit, push, and open a PR.

fix.description: Inline issue collector. Capture maintenance issues without interrupting workflow.

maintain.description: Redirects to /outhouse. Use /outhouse for repository maintenance.

outhouse.description: Repository maintenance hub: health wizard, fix-collector, evolve, lint, blueprint, wizard suite. Use /outhouse for the menu or --quick for a fast score.

hud.description: Toggle or configure the OS HUD pane.

hitchhiker.description: [REDIRECT] Use /recall instead. Knowledge search moved to the Guided Knowledge hub.

constraint.description: Log a constraint/dead-end to the DCD enrichment file.
constraint.argumentHint: <what blocked you> -- tried <X>, failed because <Y>, workaround <Z>

decide.description: Log a decision to the DCD enrichment file.

evolve.description: Analyze usage telemetry and suggest config changes to evolve your .4ge/config.json.

export.description: Export session work as a business-ready deliverable (brief, deck, handoff).

lint.description: Show rule follow-through rates and suggest demotions for under-followed rules.

lounge.description: Lounge mode is now a flag — add --lounge to any command for numbered-option interaction.

releases.description: Show recent release notes from shipped sessions.
releases.argumentHint: session number (e.g. S186) or 'all' for full list

respawn.description: Extract decision chain and prepare a fresh Claude instance with full context.
respawn.argumentHint: optional: 'dry-run' to preview DCD without writing

studio.description: Activate Studio Mode — full HUD engine + reactive hooks + badge tracking.

4ge.argumentHint: run <task> | resume | park | os | eject <type> <name> | adopt <type> <name>

substrate.description: Substrate composition engine — render text and OS state through Unicode combining marks, Math Alphanumerics, and block elements.
substrate.argumentHint: os | max <word> | palimpsest <base> <overlay> | alphabets <text> | enclosed <base> <shape> | help

debug.description: Systematic debugging — guided root-cause analysis with memory search, causal mapping, and fix verification.

recon.description: [REDIRECT] Use /recall instead (memory search, repo map, context budget, deep search).

signoff.description: Review and enrich the session cartridge before ending.

resp4wn.description: Redirects to /respawn. Legacy Context Respawn command spelling.

tour.description: 5-step guided walkthrough of the highest-value /4ge commands for new users.
